Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO ENERGY AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

Title: Ensures the public has virtual access to public service commission proceedings and may file documents electronically
Summary: Ensures the public has virtual access to public service commission proceedings and may file documents electronically.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to ensuring the public has virtual access to public service commission proceedings and may file documents electronically
